title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 20 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 20 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 20 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/01/2026
Iron ore prices on the Dalian Commodity Exchange opened sharply lower today, followed by a narrow-range rebound.The main contract, I2605, ultimately closed at 789.5 yuan/ton, down 1% from the previous trading day. Spot prices also edged down by approximately 3-7 yuan/ton compared to the previous session. Traders showed moderate enthusiasm in quoting prices, largely aligning with market trends, while steel mills maintained cauƟous inquiries and focused on replenishing inventories based on immediate needs.
